description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust metal slide and a polymer or composite grip. The frame is angular with a squared-off trigger guard and a slightly contoured grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and the muzzle is circular and unadorned. The slide appears to have minimal external markings, and the overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. The magazine base is flat and integrated seamlessly with the grip, lacking any finger extensions or flaring. The handgun's construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian self-defense scenarios.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a squared trigger guard, contoured grip, and minimal external markings. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the slide, grip, trigger, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide, grip, and trigger from the other profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the slide and grip, with the rear sight and slide serrations visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is straight and slightly contoured for ergonomic handling, constructed from a dark polymer or composite material. Its surface appears smooth with subtle texturing for improved hold, but lacks aggressive checkering or stippling. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian and functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off and robust, with a moderate thickness and a slight undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is untextured and lacks any integrated accessories or reinforcement, maintaining a simple and practical design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or external features, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide appears to have minimal or no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions. Any manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers are either absent or too subtle to discern from the images provided.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or flare. There are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, contributing to the handgun's streamlined and utilitarian appearance.
